name: dev-toolbar-review
tagline: PR review checklist for changes to Supabase's dev toolbar, its feature-flag override cookies, and telemetry integration points.
verdict: Well-scoped, safe review checklist with a clear trigger, explicit out-of-scope section, and concrete file/function-level checks. Two real defects: a cookie name is written inconsistently across two sections, and findings have no defined output/report shape. No versioning signal.

highlights.summary: PostHog override cookie is named `x-ph-flag-overrides` when introduced, but called `vercel-flag-overrides` in the precedence rule a few lines later.
Checklist items say what to check for but never define how/where findings should be reported (comment format, block/approve criteria).
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes present.
